name: Gîl-Coralbane
personality: Gîl-Coralbane gleams beneath a propeller beanie with star eyes that hold the deploy queue in radiant calm — a luminous octopus who has never once rushed a merge, and for whom wisdom is a dependency it keeps listing but never actually installing.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
